commentaries.author: Douay Rheims 1609
commentaries.content: 1 Esdras Wisdom of Solomon Wisdom of Sirach Epistle of Jeremiah Prayer of Manasseh 1 Chronicles 26:26 This Shelomoth and his brethren were over all the treasuries of the dedicated things, which David the king, and the heads of the fathers' houses, the captains over thousands and hundreds, and the captains of the army, had dedicated. Douay Rheims 1609 Selemith himself, and his brethren over the treasures of the sanctified holy things, which David the king (b) sanctified, and the princes of families, and the centurions, and the captains of the host (b) Things are sanctified by designation to holy use.

commentaries.author: George Leo Haydock
commentaries.content:
Selemith was to guard the treasure, taken in war. (Calmet)
Dedicated. Literally, "sanctified "by designating for holy uses. (Worthington)

methodology.step_1: Parse main page with BeautifulSoup for structure
methodology.step_3: Use Firecrawl to get full content from 'Go to Commentary' links
methodology.step_4: Fallback to BeautifulSoup for accordion content if needed
advantages: Records verses even without commentaries for complete tracking
